hosted.description: Multi-Gawd VPS (reference target: 32 GB Hetzner-class). We own the substrate and the bill.

prophit-vm.description: Docker container on Prophit's hardware. Their substrate; soft warnings only.

bare-metal.description: Native install on Prophit's hardware. No upper bound enforced. Log-only.

gawd_rss_bytes.help: Total resident set size of the Gawd daemon process tree, in bytes.

gawd_budget_bytes.help: Per-Gawd RAM budget for the current rung, in bytes.

gawd_budget_used_ratio.help: Ratio of current RAM use to the rung budget (0.0-1.0+).

gawd_demigawd_spawn_total.help: Cumulative DemiGawd spawns by skill since process start.

gawd_demigawd_cleanup_deleted_total.help: Cumulative DemiGawd state files deleted by cleanup runs.

gawd_state_dir_bytes.help: Total size of the DemiGawd state directory in bytes (C1 alarm signal).

gawd_state_marker_count.help: Current count of .marker files in state dir (C1 alarm signal).

gawd_state_stale_marker_age_seconds_max.help: Oldest .marker file age in seconds, where status is still incomplete (C1 alarm signal).

gawd_dispatch_total.help: Cumulative dispatches, partitioned by tier class only (NOT per model — cardinality discipline).

gawd_chain_step_latency_seconds.help: Latency of chain step calls, bucketed by step position (primary/fallback_1/...).

gawd_telegram_messages_total.help: Cumulative Telegram messages handled, partitioned by direction.

gawd_skill_fallback_total.help: Cumulative skill fallback events (skill stepped from default_tier to fallback_tier). Cardinality bounded by skill x tier x tier x reason. C2 integration.

gawd_voice_state.help: Voice subsystem state as enum: active=2, degraded=1, disabled=0, stopped=-1, unknown=-2.

gawd_voice_degradation_total.help: Cumulative voice degradation events from D2 voice relay, partitioned by kind (stt|tts).

cardinality_rules.rationale: These would create unbounded label combinations. Aggregate at tier_class / skill granularity only.
